device_name: EPIQ Series Diagnostic Ultrasound System; Affiniti Series Diagnostic Ultrasound System
intended_use: The Auto ElastQ software feature is intended to assist the user in making liver stiffness measurements using 2D-SWE through recommended particular frames and ROI positions to the user.
intended_use_full: The Auto ElastQ software feature is intended to assist the user in making liver stiffness measurements using 2D-SWE through recommended particular frames and ROI positions to the user.
ground_truth: Manual elastography measurements performed by expert readers
other_metrics: High agreement demonstrated between Auto ElastQ algorithm-generated measurements and manual elastography measurements by expert readers
